claims.claim_text: CFインダストリーズは北米の豊富で低コストなシェールガスを原料とする構造的なコスト優位性を持ち、石炭を原料とする中国生産者（コスト$250/ton delivered）に対して恒常的なコスト差（gas $2-3/MMBtu vs 中国石炭ベース$10/MMBtu相当）を維持し、価格サイクルの全局面で高収益を実現できる製造コスト構造を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 CEO Tony Will: 'This continues to demonstrate the strength of our business model and the enduring advantage we have from plentiful, low-cost North American natural gas.' / 'You can clearly see that we remain highly profitable over a very wide range of market conditions.' / Q4 2014 CFO Dennis Kelleher: 'at $60 oil, you're still talking about $10 per MMBtu...it is still not competitive in an absolute sense when you think about people like ourselves who are paying today somewhere between $2 and $3 per MMBtu for energy to produce product.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Tony Will) / CFO (Dennis Kelleher)

claims.claim_text: CFインダストリーズのドナルドソンビル・ポートニール両拡張プロジェクト（総額$4.2B）により、生産能力を25%超増加させると同時に、既存のターミナルネットワーク・バージ・鉄道ネットワークを活用した物流差別化ポジションを持ち、新規参入者が同等の物流基盤を構築することが困難な構造を有する
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CEO Tony Will: 'we have an entire network and logistical asset base that we're feeding our production into...we can generate better netbacks than anyone else out there can. And so if you're operating a single facility without benefit of all of the terminals and rail assets and barge fleets and everything else, you're really operating at a pretty significant disadvantage.' / Q3 2015 Bert Frost: 'our terminal system, we're able to supply and be fully supplied when that condensed time does take place.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Tony Will) / SVP Sales (Bert Frost)

claims.claim_text: CFインダストリーズはアンモニア流通のターミナルシステム（NuStar・Magellanパイプライン・バージ・鉄道）を通じて、農業需要の季節ピーク時（1週間〜10日間の集中出荷期）に競合他社が対応困難な速度で全国配送を実現できる物流・保管インフラ優位性を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 Bert Frost: 'I think this year, it could be 1 week to 10 days the majority of our ammonia goes out. So we're prepared...we're able to supply and be fully supplied when that condensed time does take place.' / Q4 2014 Bert Frost: 'we're able to safely move our product up through and into the Midwest through the NuStar and the Magellan pipeline, as well as with our barge system, and then backfill only a little bit through rail.'
claims.speaker: SVP Sales (Bert Frost)

claims.claim_text: CFインダストリーズはドナルドソンビルの立地（輸出ドック直結・大型外洋船積載可能）により、北米農業市場と国際市場の両方に向けて機動的に販売先を切り替えられる販売最適化能力を持ち、単一立地生産者と比較して大幅に優位なネットバック実現力を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 CEO Tony Will: 'based on the dock configuration, we're able to export approximately 50% of the D-ville production...if that looks like something that we want to increase for a not that dramatic cost, we can dredge the channel a little bit, do some infrastructure improvements and increase our export capacity.' / Q4 2014 CEO: 'Donaldsonville, in a lot of ways, could be considered an export plant...Our costs are about the same to move that product into Latin America as they are to move it into the Corn Belt.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Tony Will)

claims.claim_text: CFインダストリーズのDEF（ディーゼル排気流体）事業は年30-40%成長を続け、農業肥料とは異なる非農業産業顧客基盤を構築することで、従来の季節・作物価格依存から独立した成長セグメントを創出している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 Bert Frost: 'DEF continues to grow in the 30% to 40% range per year. We're actively participating, actively growing, actively growing our production as we already announced for Courtright and Donaldsonville, and that's a very positive light for us going forward.' / Q4 2014 Bert Frost: 'Our Other segment had solid top line performance as we experienced...a continued significant growth in DEF, along with a notable decrease in DEF prices versus last year -- increase in prices, excuse me.'
claims.speaker: SVP Sales (Bert Frost)

claims.claim_text: CFインダストリーズはリアルタイム市場分析に基づいてアンモニア・尿素・UAN間の生産配分をダイナミックに切り替え、ターミナルシステムを活用して製品のポジショニングタイミングを最適化する商業実行力を持ち、市場環境に関わらず優れたネットバックを実現する独自のプロセス能力を有する
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Bert Frost: 'we're always analyzing the options available to the country, whether that, again, be production options, market options, export options...We have different pricing structures, whether that be a forward sale, an index sale, a spot sale. Again, we utilized all 3, as well as interior sales, to achieve our...UAN price realization.' / Q3 2015 Bert Frost: 'We have an appropriate level of inventory of product that we believe is well-positioned to support our customers' needs for the fall ammonia application and spring season.'
claims.speaker: SVP Sales (Bert Frost)

claims.claim_text: CFインダストリーズは旧テラ社工場をCF基準に系統的にアップグレードする（DCSシステム導入・冗長化設備追加）プログラムにより、稼働率向上と安全性向上を実現するプロセス管理能力を構築しており、将来の設備投資を「維持資本$300-400M/年」の効率的水準に収束させる資産管理力を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CEO Tony Will: 'we have been kind of going through and systematically bringing the legacy Terra plants up to the standards that Donaldsonville and Medicine Hat have been kept to...we have redundant ammonia tank storage. We have DCS control systems on all of our production units...we're getting near the end of that process...we'll be returning to what we view as a more normalized maintenance CapEx, which is back in kind of $300 million to $400 million range.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Tony Will)

claims.claim_text: CFインダストリーズは米国天然ガス先物市場（3-5年の流動性）を活用したガスコストヘッジ戦略により、2016年の全ガス需要をほぼ$3/MMBtu固定でロックし、窒素肥料価格サイクルに対してコスト側のリスクを排除する財務的管理能力を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 CEO Tony Will: 'As we sat earlier in 2015, we looked forward and we could lock most of '16 at basically $3 flat...When we saw a forward price at $3 for the year, we thought this actually makes a fair bit of sense. And we didn't do it all at once. We kind of stepped our way into it over after a couple of different tranches.' / CFO Dennis Kelleher Q3 2015: 'For 2016 North American operations...These hedges and the fixed basis differentials we have in place for our Port Neal and Courtright complexes have taken a significant amount of cost risk off the table.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Tony Will) / CFO (Dennis Kelleher)
